title: Ubiquiti EP-54V-150W-DC, EdgePower, 54v, 150W, DC
description: EP-54V-150W-DC is removable power supply (voltage converter) for EdgePower solution. The output power of the power supply is 150W (54V) with a variable input power via DC terminal
